name: lpi-life-agent
description: An explainable AI agent that answers queries about digital twins by combining SMILE methodology with real-world case studies using the Life Programmable Interface (LPI).

query.description: User question related to digital twins or applications

answer.description: Structured response including summary, case study, analysis, and conclusion

sources.description: Tools used to generate the response

tools_used.name: get_case_studies
tools_used.role: Provides real-world implementations filtered for healthcare

notes: Uses LPI server (dist/src/index.js), not test client
Implements manual JSON-RPC communication via subprocess
Filters irrelevant case studies to improve answer quality
